specs.title: Cross-Entity View Tracking
specs.discoveredDuring: Admin dashboard redefinition session 2026-05-26. Extracted as heavy backend: three dashboard view widgets (HOST accommodation views, EDITOR post views, EDITOR event views) have no DB-backed data — PostHog tracks client-side only. Consolidated into one cross-entity tracking piece.

specs.title: Newsletter Engagement Tracking (Open / Click)
specs.discoveredDuring: Admin dashboard redefinition session 2026-05-26. EDITOR open-rate widget deferred to phase 2: newsletter_campaigns stores no engagement metrics (only totalRecipients/sentAt). Needs open/click tracking, likely via Brevo webhooks.
specs.note: Re-scoped 2026-05-30: the open/click tracking backend (newsletter_campaign_deliveries table, NewsletterTrackingService applyOpened/applyClick, Brevo webhook handler, NewsletterCampaignService.computeMetrics, GET /admin/newsletter/campaigns/{id}/metrics endpoint, use-campaign-metrics hook) ALREADY shipped under SPEC-101. Remaining work is frontend-only: EDITOR dashboard Card C widget (apps/admin/src/lib/dashboard-sources/editor.ts:29 still says PHASE 2) plus optionally exposing openRate/clickRate percentages in the API response. Complexity downgraded high->low.

specs.title: Admin Audit & Security Log Query Layer
specs.discoveredDuring: Admin dashboard redefinition session 2026-05-26. SUPER_ADMIN audit-log + security-log widgets: logging infra (audit-logger.ts, AuditEventType) is logger-only, not queryable. Needs a queryable store + admin endpoints gated by AUDIT_LOG_VIEW / SECURITY_LOG_VIEW.

specs.title: AI Foundation Package (provider-agnostic @repo/ai-core)
specs.note: FOUNDATION spec for adding AI to Hospeda. Only the infra: @repo/ai-core package (provider-agnostic, Vercel AI SDK wrapped), admin-managed config (new PermissionEnum.AI_SETTINGS_MANAGE, SUPER_ADMIN), encrypted secrets vault (keys editable from admin, decrypted in apps/api, passed to package by param), usage metering + per-plan entitlement enforcement (login required for ALL AI, no anonymous), cost ceiling + kill-switch + threshold alerts via @repo/notifications, SSE streaming primitive, safety layer (rate-limit + injection guard + moderation + PII scrub for external telemetry), tables in @repo/db (NOT portable — conscious tradeoff, DB access isolated in storage/). Multi-provider = fallback + per-feature routing (V1); advanced routing + vector DB/embeddings + async jobs = V2. 4 V1 features (text improvement, NL search, accommodation chat, admin tech-support) are CHILD specs, out of scope here. Allocated SPEC-173 = max(git=172, engram-stale=144)+1. SS12 mandatory decision protocol: consult owner on ANY ambiguity. Tasks not yet atomized; 7 blocking open questions in spec.md SS8.

specs.title: Admin Guided Welcome Tour (role-based, config-driven)
specs.note: Role-based guided welcome tour for apps/admin (HOST/EDITOR/ADMIN/SUPER_ADMIN). Hybrid UX: Radix Dialog welcome modal + optional driver.js spotlight (dep-policy exception, lazy-loaded). Contextual & separate tours (NO cross-route nav): welcome per role + mini-tours per key section, auto on first visit. Config-driven sibling of SPEC-154 IA config (tour.schema.ts + tours.ts, Zod boot-validated, inline I18nLabel es/en/pt). Catalog v1 = 4 welcome + 15 contextual = 19 tours. SCOPE FINDING: persistence cannot use admin /users PATCH (MANAGE_USERS unassigned to any role; HOST/EDITOR lack USER_READ_ALL per SPEC-169) -> dedicated protected endpoint PATCH /api/v1/protected/users/me/tour-progress with server-side merge into UserSettings.onboarding.adminTours (tourId->seenVersion map). Versioning: auto-offer iff config.version>seen; manual replay ignores version. Touches apps/admin + apps/api + @repo/schemas + @repo/service-core. NOT atomized, implementation NOT started (owner: spec-only for now). Open Qs Q1-Q5 in spec.md sec.15.

specs.title: Admin What's New / Release Notes Dialog
specs.note: Curated-in-repo release-notes feature for admin (v1). Trigger = content publish, NOT deploy/git SHA. Four entry points (auto modal for highlights, topbar badge, panel, dashboard card on all role dashboards) share ONE useWhatsNew() hook. Per-user state in UserSettings.onboarding.whatsNew {baselineAt, seenIds}, lazy-init on first GET (covers existing users, no migration). GET /api/v1/protected/whats-new (role-filtered + computed seen + unseenCount) + dedicated PATCH /api/v1/protected/users/me/whats-new-seen (server-side merge). Sibling of SPEC-174 (shares onboarding JSONB namespace + protected merge pattern, additive so parallel-safe). Content = Zod-validated TS file in apps/api, markdown body sanitized (TipTap read-only, TBD-1), images via CDN URL (TBD-2 origin + CSP img-src). 18 tasks T-001..T-018 across 9 phases. Open: Q1 PermissionEnum, Q2 icon, Q3 sheet modality, Q4/Q5 ListWidget callbacks, TBD-1 renderer, TBD-2 CDN origin.

specs.title: PostHog Reverse Proxy — first-party analytics ingestion (web)
specs.note: Driver BETA-77. Web PostHog sends events directly to us.i.posthog.com — blocked by ad-blockers (est. 25-35% desktop loss in Argentina). Solution: Cloudflare Worker proxying /ingest/* on hospeda.com.ar to PostHog Cloud US. Web-only (admin out of scope). CRITICAL coupling: CSP in middleware-helpers.ts hardcodes the PostHog external hosts; removing them and changing PUBLIC_POSTHOG_HOST must be atomic with the Worker already live. 11 tasks across 4 phases: phase-worker (Worker + wrangler + test), phase-app (CSP + env-registry + CSP regression test), phase-docs, phase-verify (owner ops + smoke). T-010/T-011 are owner-only manual actions.
